title: lovdaCN registry item
description: A single item in a lovdaCN registry (component, lib, or style).

$schema.description: The URL of the JSON schema for this file.

name.description: The name of the item. Used to identify the item in the registry. Must be unique.

type.description: The type of the item. Determines the target path when resolved for a project.

title.description: A human-readable title for the registry item. Keep it short and descriptive.

description.description: A brief overview of the item.

author.description: The author of the item. Recommended format: username <url>.

dependencies.description: NPM dependencies required by the registry item.

devDependencies.description: NPM dev dependencies required by the registry item.

registryDependencies.description: Other registry items this item depends on. Use the item name for lovdaCN components or a URL for other registries.

files.description: The files that make up the registry item.

path.description: The path to the file relative to the registry root.

type.description: The type of the file. Used to determine the target path when resolved for a project.

target.description: The target path of the file in the project. Supports the @components/, @ui/, @lib/, and @hooks/ placeholders which resolve to the aliases configured in lvcn.json.

meta.description: Additional metadata for the registry item, e.g. { "engine": "nativewind", "style": "default" }.

docs.description: Documentation for the registry item as a markdown string.

categories.description: The categories of the registry item.
